commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=403c42c21fcc194287ba8f7997704b79becb2c11)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds an opt-in `streaming.progress.persistProgress` config field, shared frozen progress-line compositor support, Telegram final-answer prepending, a Telegram UI hint, and focused unit tests.

PR surface: Source +95, Tests +189. Total +284 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a user bug report. The remaining PR defects are source-reproducible from PR head: shared config scope exceeds final-delivery wiring and generated metadata lacks `persistProgress`.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the remaining blockers include product scope for the shared config surface and contributor real-behavior proof, not only a safe automated code repair.

target.title: feat(streaming): opt-in persistProgress mode for tool+commentary lines
target.body:
## Summary

- Add `streaming.progress.persistProgress` config flag (opt-in, default false)
- When enabled, completed tool+commentary progress lines are frozen and prepended above the final answer instead of being wiped
- Shared infra change in `channel-streaming.ts` and `progress-draft-compositor.ts` benefits all channels
- Telegram: respects 4096 char limit, truncates oldest lines, `---` divider between progress and answer

## Motivation

The P2 commentary draft system (#87072) is transient by design -- progress lines are wiped when the answer starts streaming. This PR adds an opt-in mode to persist the chronological tool+commentary record in the final message.

Builds on #87072 (merged) and pairs with #89834 (Claude CLI commentary events).

## Files changed

- `src/config/types.base.ts` -- `persistProgress` on shared `ChannelStreamingProgressConfig`
- `src/config/zod-schema.providers-core.ts` -- schema entry
- `src/channels/streaming.ts` -- `resolveChannelStreamingProgressPersist` + persist mode in `mergeChannelProgressDraftLine`
- `src/channels/progress-draft-compositor.ts` -- frozen line tracking + `formatFrozenProgressText(charBudget)`
- `extensions/telegram/src/bot-message-dispatch.ts` -- prepend frozen progress to final answer
- `extensions/telegram/src/config-ui-hints.ts` -- UI hint
- `extensions/discord/src/config-ui-hints.ts` -- UI hint

## Test plan

- [x] 3 tests in `channel-streaming.test.ts` (resolver, persist stacking, default unchanged)
- [x] 4 tests in `progress-draft-compositor.test.ts` (freeze on suppress, no freeze when off, char budget, empty when off)
- [x] Existing tests pass
target.author: anagnorisis2peripeteia

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
